testcase.name: @BeforeClass setUp

failure.message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 145 Current browser version is 148.0.7778.168 with binary path C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe Build info: version: '3.14.0', revision: 'aacccce0', time: '2018-08-02T20:19:58.91Z' System info: host: 'DESKTOP-FQ51T68', ip: '192.168.1.2', os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.11' Driver info: driver.version: ChromeDriver remote stacktrace: Symbols not available.
